query: SELECT id, handle, platform, displayName, CASE WHEN accessToken IS NOT NULL AND accessToken != '' THEN 'HAS_TOKEN' ELSE 'NO_TOKEN' END as tokenStatus, linkedinUrn FROM instagram_accounts;
